Package com.mycompany.weblab5

package com.mycompany.weblab5
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.mycompany.weblab5.resources
     
  • Class
    Description
    BlogController
    Controller servlet for managing blog operations like adding and deleting posts
    BlogException
    Exception thrown in case one of model functions fails in any way (used in tests)
    BlogInitializer
    Initializes the blog model and stores it in the servlet context
    BlogModel
    Represents the model component of the blog application.
    BlogPost
    Represents a single post in the blog.
    Column
     
    IDCode
     
    JakartaRestConfiguration
    Configures Jakarta RESTful Web Services for the application.
    RandomLetter
     
    ViewServlet
    View servlet for displaying the blog history and reading cookies
